case_title: BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC. VS. FOURTH FLOOR RESTAURANT TWO, LLC A CALIFORNIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-04-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-24-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOURTH FLOOR RESTAURANT TWO, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CUPOLA PIZZERIA $3,216.82 PRINCIPAL, $165.44 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,667.26, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100003085)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100003085), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC. SERVED JUL-29-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FOURTH FLOOR RESTAURANT TWO, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CUPOLA PIZZERIA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-04-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100003085) AS TO DEFENDANT FOURTH FLOOR RESTAURANT TWO, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CUPOLA PIZZERIA
